evidence.testCommand: pnpm -C apps/www exec vitest run src/lib/delivery-loop-status.test.ts src/server-actions/get-delivery-loop-status.test.ts

keyTestResults.test: isDeliveryLoopStateActivelyWorking > treats active execution phases as working
keyTestResults.assertion: VAL-UI-001: UI progression reflects active delivery-loop phase mapping

keyTestResults.test: isDeliveryLoopStateActivelyWorking > treats blocked, awaiting, and terminal phases as not working
keyTestResults.assertion: VAL-UI-002: Blocked/manual-fix state is clearly surfaced

keyTestResults.test: getDeliveryLoopStatusAction > projects terminated workflow heads consistently
keyTestResults.assertion: VAL-UI-003: Terminal UI states render as terminal and non-working

keyTestResults.test: shouldRefreshDeliveryLoopStatusFromThreadPatch > refreshes for PR link and status field changes
keyTestResults.assertion: VAL-UI-004: PR linkage visibility is accurate and stable

keyTestResults.test: shouldRefreshDeliveryLoopStatusFromThreadPatch > refreshes for shell status changes, refetch, and agent-message patches
keyTestResults.assertion: VAL-UI-005: Delivery-loop UI refreshes on material patches

keyTestResults.test: getDeliveryLoopAwareThreadStatus > upgrades inactive transport states to working when the loop is active
keyTestResults.assertion: VAL-UI-006: Awaiting-pr-link and babysitting states map to stable user-visible progression

blockers.description: Web service requires GitHub OAuth credentials (GITHUB_CLIENT_ID, GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET, etc.) which are not available in this environment
blockers.impact: Cannot run full browser automation tests with agent-browser
blockers.workaround: Unit tests validate UI logic; full browser testing requires environment with OAuth credentials
